rulings.Case Title: CARL A. WESCOTT VS. BRAD OLDENBROOK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Brad Oldenbrook, Simon Wong, Todd Elsberg, Exclusive Holdings Llc, Devengar Sa'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday May 23, 2018, line 6. Defendants Brad Oldenbrook, Simon Wong, Todd Elsberg, Exclusive Holdings Llc, Devengar Sa'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULLED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's First Cause of Action is OVERRULLED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient fact to states a cause of action for fraudulent misrepresentation. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's Second Cause of Action is OVERRULLED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to states a cause of action for Promissory Fraud. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's Third Cause of Action is OVERRULLED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient fact to demonstrate a partnership. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts for breach of fiduciary duties. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiff's Fourth Cause of Action is SUSTAINED. Plaintiff fails to allege sufficient facts that a contract was entered into with him and Defendants Exclusive Holdings LLC and Devengar SA. The purported contract is not attached to the First Amended Complaint. = (501/CFH)
